dataset.name: simulator_generated_dlo_factorial_tables
dataset.license_status: researcher_owned_internal; DGCC repository has no public license -> public_redistribution=false

splits.hidden_confirmation: SHA256('where-vs-how-dlo-v1|conf|task|stratum|index|20260712'); 16 states/task, generated by the same operator (verifier isolation NOT claimable), analyzed once after estimator freeze

split_note: canonical harness split keys; 'search_dev' is the bundle's dev_search, 'hidden_confirmation' is the bundle's confirmation_hidden executed as a single-operator once-analyzed confirmation split

generation.error_metric: dgcc.tasks.reward.distance_to_goal (correspondence_l2 covenant path); chamfer forbidden as primary
